name: Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 cups bread cubes (from ends saved in freezer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread cubes, raisins, and apples in a large bowl.
2. Add water or milk and sugar to the bowl. Mix thoroughly and let stand for 20-30 minutes.
3. Stir in beaten egg whites until just foamy. Add cinnamon and vanilla, mixing well.
4. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart sprayed casserole dish.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 60 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
